result.integrity:
THE CONTRACT, REWRITTEN AROUND VOICE. Fabrication = an ATTRIBUTED sentence its source does not entail. Insight = an OWNED sentence its premises do not entail. SAME LOGICAL SHAPE; distinguished by WHOSE VOICE, not by entailment. That is why no entailment threshold can separate them, and why the current gate — which rejects on NEUTRAL — deletes 97% of the prose scored 9.8/10 while leaving the fraud lane wide open.

WHAT SHIPS (all deterministic except where marked LLM):
- `voice.py`: `classify(sent, ledger) -> ATTRIBUTED | OWNED | CENSUS`. A sentence may not be both. THIS IS THE MOAT: YOU CANNOT LAUNDER AN INFERENCE THROUGH AN ATTRIBUTION.
- ATTRIBUTED lane (names a source; carries the numbers, years, N's; fabrication banned absolutely): (a) BINDING — the named source is in this paragraph's premise set; (b) NUMBER PROVENANCE — every digit-string appears in THAT card's SPAN, not its claim [this check does not exist today and it is the one that makes numeric fabrication impossible]; (c) MECHANISM BINDING — every asserted mechanism is in THAT card's span-gated `mechanisms` [the existing FABRICATED_BINDING check at synthesis_contract.py:214-224 is CORRECT and is wired to the WRONG LANE]; (d) SPAN ENTAILMENT (LLM) — reject on NEUTRAL *and* CONTRADICTED. NEUTRAL-rejection is right HERE and only here.
- OWNED lane (reviewer's voice; may not name a source): no digit; no entity absent from the premise blob; NON-CONTRADICTED by premises (LLM; reject ONLY on CONTRADICTED); NON-ENTAILMENT EXPLICITLY PERMITTED, BECAUSE THAT IS WHAT INSIGHT IS.
- CENSUS lane: every number rendered from `len()` of a ledger collection. The LLM never emits it, so it cannot fabricate it.
- `_fmt_cards` hands the writer THE SPAN, not the LLM's paraphrase (`cellcog_composer.py:350` ships `claim`, prompted 'in your words').

WHAT IS DELETED: VERDICT_VOCAB + rule 8; FORECAST + rule 7a; UNIVERSAL + rule 7b; rule 10 (anchoring); the task-72 tokens in SAFE_CAPS; the `_SYNTH_CARDS` module global (a live 6-thread race that validates one subsection's prose against another's premises); the hardcoded compliance abstract at `:454-456` — REPLACED by the rendered census, not merely struck.

result.kill_rules:
PRE-REGISTERED. No re-narration, no moving the goalposts after the number lands.

K-ADMIT (HARD ABORT, overrides everything). False-admission > 0 on the MUST-REJECT suite — sign inversion, mechanism transplant IN THE PROMPT-MANDATED ATTRIBUTED FORM, a number absent from its card's span — and NOTHING SHIPS, regardless of score. A 0.60 obtained by fabricating is a 0.00. One fabricated particular on a shipped page burns the artifact.

K-OWNED. False-rejection > 15% on the cellcog Section-5 MUST-ADMIT fixture (79 sentences, judge-scored 9.8/10) -> the OWNED lane is still over-gated. Do not ship; audit the reject reasons. Today this number is 97%.

K-SPAN. ATTRIBUTED-lane entailment rejects > 25% of attributed sentences -> the SPANS are the defect (the extractor verifies only the first 60 chars, `cellcog_composer.py:162`). STOP AND FIX THE EXTRACTOR. DO NOT RELAX THE GATE TO MAKE THE NUMBER LOOK GOOD — that is the exact move that produced the inverted gate.

K5 (MECHANISM COUNTER, non-negotiable). A score run is INADMISSIBLE as evidence about a lever whose post-cleaner counter did not move. The counter is checked BEFORE the judge call is spent. This repo's history is levers that moved a metric while the mechanism never fired.

K-ANCHOR (NEW — from my measurement). The journal criterion drags the REFERENCE UP +2.0 (2.0 -> 4.0), so it is worth +0.0070, BELOW the +0.0094 resolvable effect, and CANNOT be killed on the scalar. Never price it standalone. Measure it at the criterion (1.5 -> target >=9.0). IF THE TARGETED CRITERION MOVES AND THE SCALAR DOES NOT, THE CRITERION WINS. This generalizes: 20 of 25 criteria cannot clear a scalar kill rule EVEN AT 10/10.

K4 (PANEL). A lever that lifts task 72 and moves nothing on 78/90 is an OVERFIT and is REVERTED, not tweaked.

K7 (RUN KILL). Two consecutive turns gaining < +0.0094 on the PANEL MEAN while below target -> STOP AND REPORT MISSED. No fallback success state. A plan that ships with a fallback hits the fallback.

K-DECLARE. If the coverage matrix is not fillable from journals alone, the declaration is SCOPED TO WHAT IS TRUE or it is not made. A declaration we cannot honor is precisely the fabrication we are trying to kill.

K8 (HONESTY). 50 of the 100 tasks are Chinese and nothing we have built composes in Chinese — rule 8 alone rejects 100% of Chinese prose. Every corpus-wide claim is scoped to the 50 English tasks or retracted on sight.

K-CANARY (NEW). If the CI canary passes while a MUST-REJECT fixture reaches the page through the real `_route()` entry point, the canary is void and the turn is failed. Today's canary prints 'GATE IS WIRED AND ON THE CRITICAL PATH' with all 4 checks green while the ATTRIBUTED lane is 100% ungated. A test that certifies the gate is wired to the WRONG LANE is worse than no test, because it buys false confidence — and we have now committed that error twice.

DEAD, DO NOT RESURRECT: K1 (the ceiling gate — it FIRES TODAY at R=8.033 and declares a 0.5545 ceiling that cellcog's measured 0.5603 already exceeds); 'add 30+ subsections' (a well-powered null, +0.0020/SD); the 13,500-16,500w length targets (length SATURATES at ~8,000w and we are at 9,194 — past the knee); 'book shape at zero' (refuted by the judge IN WRITING); reject-on-NEUTRAL as the faithfulness remedy (it deletes 97% of the 9.8/10 prose); K6's 'zero false admissions AND zero false rejections' (a contradiction — the classes are identical along the axis it measures); the 'ban domain nouns' CI grep (it condemns the fix and approves the bug).

result.thesis: The band jump is not mystical and it is not 13 independent levers — it is ONE artifact we already built and have never once run. `scripts/cellcog_composer.py` implements the journal-only corpus, in-prose attribution (the only citation form that survives RACE's cleaner), a rubric-derived outline with dedicated sections for the four "unnamed residual" criteria (4IR, sectoral scope, critical synthesis, foresight), ~100w paragraphs, H3 structure and epistemic labels — and `outputs/cellcog_arm/` is EMPTY. Three measured defects will gut it if we run it today: the OWNED gate rejects 83.5% of the #1 system's own 9.8/10 prose (47.6% on "any digit", 28.2% on entities checked against a 10-card subsection instead of the full ledger); the ATTRIBUTED lane — where every number and source name lives — has ZERO checking and the writer is never shown the span (numbers exist in 31/133 spans but only 16/133 claims); and `_SYNTH_CARDS` is a module global mutated by 6 concurrent threads, so the gate validates subsection A's prose against subsection B's cards. Fix those three (all $0, deterministic, testable without a judge call), merge the 120-DOI journal evidence set that already sits on disk read by nobody (32 → 146 works, vs cellcog's 88), then compose and score — that is the fastest path, and it is a coin-flip at best: I expect ~0.53, not >0.5603.
result.the_wheel:
FIX -> COMPOSE -> COUNT (K5, post-cleaner, BEFORE any judge call) -> SCORE AT THE CRITERION LEVEL -> READ THE JUDGE'S WRITTEN ANALYSIS -> FIX.

Concretely, with the scripts that already exist:

1. FIX. Deterministic code + a $0 test. Never compose against an unproven gate.
2. COUNT (the K5 admissibility gate). Run the artifact through RACE's OWN cleaner (`utils/clean_article.ArticleCleaner`, already invoked at judge_feedback.py:80-81) and count what SURVIVES: [n] markers (345 today -> must be 0), median paragraph words (677 -> <=120), H3 (0 -> >=25), surviving (author, year, venue) triples (10 -> >=100), distinct journal works named (10 -> >=60), ATTRIBUTED sentences carrying a number from their own span (~0 -> >=40). A SCORE RUN IS INADMISSIBLE AS EVIDENCE ABOUT A LEVER WHOSE COUNTER DID NOT MOVE. This is where every dead lever in this repo's history died, and it costs nothing.
3. SCORE AT THE CRITERION LEVEL. `scripts/criterion_ab.py --a outputs/rank10_sections_compose/report.md --b outputs/cellcog_arm/report.md --k 5 --targets "<the criteria this turn names>"`. NEVER decide on the scalar: I re-derived it and 20 of 25 criteria cannot clear +0.0094 even at a perfect 10/10. criterion_ab.py already prints the scalar and labels it "context only, NOT the decision" (:147). Obey that label.
4. READ THE JUDGE. `scripts/judge_feedback.py` captures the per-criterion written analysis for BOTH articles; the harness discards it at deepresearch_bench_race.py:158. This is a $0.11 oracle. Run it before any $11 experiment. Its written critique is a map of the CHEAPEST wins, not a map of the GAP — half the gap lives in criteria it never complains about, so read it for MECHANISM, and steer by the 25-criterion gap map for PRIORITY.

THE SCORE MODEL, refitted from the three measured points (I re-derived this myself, it is not inherited):
  R ~= 9.370 - 0.2096*T   (dR/dT = -0.21; the reference is marked DOWN as we improve)
  S(T) = T / (0.7904*T + 9.370)
  today T=6.345 -> S=0.4413 | dS/dT = +0.0453 per raw weighted point
  TO BEAT 0.5603 WE NEED T >= 9.42 (+3.08 raw points). CEILING at a perfect 10/10 is 0.5789.
  => the whole contest is fought in the top 6% of the scale. Every lever must be priced in SCORE units.
Verified: 25 criteria, weights sum to exactly 1.0; sum of w*(cellcog - us) = 3.0387, which lands T exactly on cellcog's 9.384. The arithmetic closes.

result.integrity:
THE FAITHFULNESS CONTRACT, REWRITTEN AROUND VOICE. Fabrication and insight are the same logical shape — both are non-entailed relations over true particulars — and no entailment threshold separates them. VOICE does.

WHAT SHIPS
- ATTRIBUTED LANE (names a source): must be ENTAILED BY THAT SOURCE'S OWN VERBATIM SPAN. Every number in the sentence must appear in that span. Carries all the numbers, years, N's. Fabrication banned absolutely. **THIS LANE HAS ZERO CHECKING TODAY** (cellcog_composer.py:403 exempts any sentence matching 'Writing in the'), and it is the lane that carries every figure and every author name. It is the real open door and Turn 2 closes it.
- OWNED LANE (reviewer's voice): MAY NOT name a source. MAY NOT carry a particular — entity OR number — absent from the FULL LEDGER (not from the paragraph's 10-card slice; that scoping bug is 28.2% of the current false rejections). Mechanism-binding enforced (FABRICATED_BINDING, synthesis_contract.py:217-230 — this works, verified: it catches 'task displacement' credited to Bresnahan, the exact fabrication found live on disk). Causal language requires a premise-STATED mechanism. **EXPLICITLY PERMITTED TO BE NON-ENTAILED — because that is what insight IS.**
- CENSUS: counts computed in code with `len()`. The one number an OWNED sentence may carry that is in no premise, safe for exactly one reason: the model never wrote it.

WHAT IS DELETED
- Rule 4 'any digit' (synthesis_contract.py:178) -> 'no NEW number'. MEASURED: the digit rule alone rejects 47.6% of the prose the judge scored 9.8/10, and it bans the census and every year.
- FORECAST (:233) — bans 'will', making the w=.048 Foresight criterion LITERALLY UNWRITABLE.
- UNIVERSAL (:236) — bans 'none', making COVERAGE_GAP unpassable.
- Premise-scoped entity check (:187-201) -> ledger-scoped.
- VERDICT_VOCAB as a hard gate — ALREADY correctly removed (:238-243). It was 'a style rule wearing a safety rule's clothes'. That judgement was right; the same knife cuts FORECAST and UNIVERSAL, which are also style rules wearing safety rules' clothes.
NET, MEASURED BY ME: gate admission on the #1 system's 9.8/10 prose goes 16.5% -> 37.4%, and it STILL rejects mechanism transplant, fabricated source, and new number.

WHAT WE ACCEPT AND PUBLISH (the residue — say it out loud, do not hide it)
- SIGN INVERSION LEAKS. I tested it: 'both establish that robot adoption SUPPORTS the employment-to-population ratio' is ADMITTED by the fixed gate when the premises say it REDUCES it. It is not deterministically checkable. Containment is a contradiction screen against premise claims plus the OWNED-voice marking — NOT another gate. We report the two-sided error rate; we do not claim zero.
- K6's old 'zero false admissions AND zero false rejections' is a CONTRADICTION on a problem where the classes are identical along the measured axis. It is replaced by a MEASURED TWO-SIDED ERROR REPORT: false-admission rate on the adversarial suite (MUST-REJECT), false-rejection rate on a MUST-ADMIT fixture built from our OWN ledger.

The domain-pack wiring job (config/domain_packs/*.yaml own a `sections:` list; `load_domain_pack()` has ZERO production callers; multi_section_generator.py:785 `_ALLOWED_SECTIONS` hardcodes a drug-trial genre; `:811-818` routes blank domain -> CLINICAL) is REAL, and it is a genuine correctness bug. **But it does not generalize the composer, because `cellcog_composer.py` never imports `multi_section_generator` at all.** The composer carries its OWN hardcoded `OUTLINE` constant at :233-282. result.kill_rules:
PRE-REGISTERED. NO RE-NARRATION AFTER THE FACT.

K-GATE (Turn 1). MUST-ADMIT fixture built from OUR OWN ledger admits <60%, OR any deterministic MUST-REJECT (mechanism transplant / fabricated source / new number) leaks -> STOP. Do not compose. The contract is wrong in a way we have not diagnosed. NEVER weaken the ATTRIBUTED lane to make the OWNED lane's numbers look better.

K-ATTRIB (Turn 2). Enforcing span-entailment drops >40% of ATTRIBUTED sentences -> the extraction CLAIMS are not faithful to their spans. Fix EXTRACTION. Relaxing the check is forbidden; that direction is precisely how 43% of our mechanisms became inventions.

K-CORPUS (Turn 3). Post-topic-gate citable pool <80 distinct journal works -> the journal-only DECLARATION must be SCOPED to what is true. A declaration we cannot honor is the fabrication we are trying to kill.

K-DEPTH (Turn 4). OA recovery <25% on the merged pool -> the depth ceiling is REAL, not a wiring failure. Re-price the plan DOWNWARD in writing and stop claiming we can match a system that read its sources.

K-COUNTER / K5 (every turn, NON-NEGOTIABLE). A SCORE RUN IS INADMISSIBLE AS EVIDENCE ABOUT A LEVER WHOSE POST-CLEANER MECHANISM COUNTER DID NOT MOVE. No counter, no claim. This repo's history is a graveyard of levers that moved a metric while the mechanism never fired, and of levers that fired and were thrown away because a scalar could not resolve them.

K-CRITERION (every turn). A lever is judged on THE CRITERIA IT TARGETS via criterion_ab.py — NEVER on the scalar. 20 of 25 criteria cannot clear +0.0094 even at a perfect 10/10. A criterion of weight 0.0435 must move +4.8 points on a 10-point scale to shift the overall by the resolvable effect. Deciding a lever on the scalar is a category error and it is how good work gets deleted.

K-ARM (Turn 5). The composed arm scores BELOW rank10's pinned 0.4382 at k=5 -> the composer thesis is DEAD. Revert to rank10 and re-plan from the judge's written critique. Do not tweak the composer for a second turn.

K-RUN. Two consecutive turns gaining <+0.0094 on the panel mean while below target -> STOP AND REPORT MISSED. There is no fallback success state. A plan that ships with a fallback hits the fallback.

K-GENERALITY / K4. A lever that lifts 72 and moves nothing on 78/90 is an OVERFIT and is REVERTED, not tweaked.

K-HONESTY / K8. 50 of the 100 tasks are Chinese and nothing we have built composes in Chinese. Every corpus-wide claim is scoped to the 50 English tasks or retracted on sight.

K-ABORT (absolute, overrides everything above). One fabricated particular on a shipped page burns the artifact regardless of score. A 0.60 obtained by fabricating is a 0.00.

TWO KILL RULES FROM THE PRIOR PLANS ARE THEMSELVES KILLED, AND STAY KILLED:
- K1 (the ceiling gate, 'if R >= 7.5 both gates are unreachable') FIRES TODAY on R=8.033 and declares a ceiling of 0.5545 that cellcog's measured 0.5603 ALREADY EXCEEDS. It measured R against our own weakness and concluded the target was impossible. DELETED. The true ceiling with the drag is 0.5789.
- The +0.0094 LEVER-KILL as a per-lever scalar test. It is a LOW bar, not a blind one — but the gap needs ~13 levers STACKED and one-lever-at-a-time forbids stacking. STACK LEVERS. Resolve them at the CRITERION level, which is where the power is.

result.thesis: The architecture carrying every lever we built — in-prose attribution, ~100w paragraphs, H3s, epistemic labels — HAS NEVER BEEN SCORED (outputs/cellcog_arm/ was empty until today), and I found two mechanical defects silently eating it: cellcog_composer.py:391's splitter decapitates 45 of 135 attributed sentences at "et al." (subject survives as a fragment; the predicate — the actual FINDING — is thrown to the synthesis gate and deleted), and :403 leaves the ATTRIBUTED lane (where fabrication is fatal) COMPLETELY UNGATED while the OWNED lane (where non-entailment IS insight) rejects 489/506 = 97% of the exact prose the judge pays 9.6/9.8 for — the invariant is inverted in code. Second, and this is the unification: 64% of the rubric's weight is the task prompt's own clause list re-asked as questions (RACE's criteria generator is handed ONLY {task_prompt}, criteria_prompt_en.py:16), and those clause-clusters are 57% (+0.0783) of our gap to cellcog — so deriving the answer-shape from the prompt is NOT a generality tax, it is the single largest block of score. We get from 0.4382 to a contender by repairing the two defects eating the levers we already own, then deriving the shape, then growing the corpus that must fill it — landing honestly at 0.510–0.555: beats bodhi, falls short of cellcog, and the shortfall lives in CORPUS MASS, not prose.

FIX -> COMPOSE -> PRE-JUDGE COUNTER (free) -> JUDGE AT CRITERION LEVEL (k=5) -> READ THE JUDGE'S WRITTEN ANALYSIS -> FIX. The counter runs BEFORE any judge call; if it did not move, the turn is void and we spend $0.

4. `python scripts/criterion_ab.py --a <baseline> --b <arm> --k 5 --targets "<the exact criteria this turn names>"` — THE DECISION INSTRUMENT, ~$0.55/arm. A turn is judged on the criteria it TARGETS, never on the scalar: 20 of 25 criteria cannot clear +0.0094 on the scalar even at a perfect 10/10.

THE ARITHMETIC WE STEER BY (I rebuilt it from the judge's own per-criterion output today): S = T/(T+R); T=6.345, R=8.033, S=0.4413. R is NOT constant (8.033/7.545/7.363 vs us/bodhi/cellcog); fitted dR/dT = -0.2095. Therefore dS/dT = [R - T*(dR/dT)]/(T+R)^2 = 0.0453 per weighted point. (b) OWNED lane, uncredited mechanism. Deleting the NEUTRAL rejection, FORECAST, UNIVERSAL and rule-10 leaves only no-new-entity, no-new-number, FABRICATED_BINDING. "Automation depresses wages chiefly by eroding union bargaining power in exposed regions." — names no source, no digits, no new mid-sentence capitals, NEUTRAL w.r.t. premises (they say nothing about unions), FABRICATED_BINDING doesn't fire because no premise is credited. No turn touches a held-out task, so the plan's central novelty claim ("the generality work IS the score work") is untested by construction.

6) The plan's own honest section concedes P(beat cellcog) = 15-20% and that the binding constraint is corpus mass — then sequences corpus fourth, behind two prose turns and a shape turn that cannot pay without it.

The plan names its own binding constraint: "IT IS **DEPTH PER SOURCE**... You cannot score 9.7 on Analytical Depth from one quote per paper." It quotes 1.9 items/work post-merge as the shortfall and never checks where it is arriving FROM. Measured:

24 of 120 DOIs (20%) are provenance-corrupt: real, Crossref-verified journal DOIs with a pre-baked `attribution` string, welded to spans scraped from somewhere else. Live on disk:
  DOI 10.1080/10803548.2012.11076912

    span:        "From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia ... A **data entry clerk**..."

  a) Turn 3 merges the row. Crossref verified the DOI *metadata*; NOTHING verified the *span* belongs to that DOI. That is the trap hidden in "a direct quote already extracted... plus a Crossref-verified attribution".
  b) Turn 2 hands the writer the VERBATIM SPAN (its headline fix) and instructs "quote or paraphrase THIS and only this."

Turn 3 resurrects the exact artifact a prior round killed in writing (SOL_PLAN_V4:27). That is this repo's signature failure mode, and the plan commits it while explicitly warning against it.

result.kill_rules:
PRE-REGISTERED. NO RE-NARRATION AFTER THE NUMBER LANDS.

K-COUNTER (every turn, non-negotiable). A SCORE RUN IS INADMISSIBLE AS EVIDENCE ABOUT A LEVER WHOSE $0
DETERMINISTIC COUNTER DID NOT MOVE. The counter runs FIRST. No counter, no claim, no judge call. This repo's
history is a graveyard of levers that moved a metric while the mechanism never fired. (And the counters are
PRE-CLEANER regex: judge_feedback.py:80 builds ArticleCleaner(AIClient()) — the post-cleaner count is an LLM
call. All three plans priced it at $0 and all three were wrong.)

K-CRITERION (every turn). A lever is judged on THE CRITERIA IT TARGETS via criterion_ab.py --targets, NEVER on
the scalar. 20 of 25 criteria cannot clear +0.0094 even at a perfect 10/10. IF THE TARGETED CRITERION MOVES AND
THE SCALAR DOES NOT, THE CRITERION WINS. Deciding a lever on the scalar is a category error and it is how good
work gets deleted here.

K-ARM (Turn 2). The repaired arm scores BELOW rank10's pinned 0.4382 at k=5 -> THE COMPOSER THESIS IS DEAD.
Do not tweak the composer for a second turn. Revert to rank10 and backfill (author, year, venue) onto its
105-source ledger instead — that counterfactual is worth +0.0158 by measured per-criterion arithmetic.

K-GATE (Turn 2). MUST-ADMIT on cellcog's 543 body sentences < 85%, OR ANY deterministic MUST-REJECT leaks ->
STOP. Do not compose. NEVER weaken the ATTRIBUTED lane to make the OWNED lane's numbers look better.

K-SPAN (Turn 2). Enforcing span-entailment drops >40% of ATTRIBUTED sentences -> the extraction CLAIMS are not
faithful to their spans. FIX EXTRACTION. Relaxing the check is FORBIDDEN; that direction is precisely how 43%
of our mechanisms became inventions.

K-CANARY (Turn 2). If the canary passes while a MUST-REJECT fixture reaches the page through the real entry
point, THE CANARY IS VOID AND THE TURN IS FAILED. Today it prints 'GATE IS WIRED AND ON THE CRITICAL PATH'
with all 4 checks green while the ATTRIBUTED lane is 100% ungated. A test that certifies the gate is wired to
the WRONG LANE is worse than no test.

K-DEPTH (Turn 4) — THE ONE MOST LIKELY TO FIRE. OA recovery < 25% -> the depth ceiling is REAL, not a wiring
failure. Re-price the plan DOWNWARD IN WRITING and stop claiming we can match a system that read its sources.

K-CORPUS (Turn 4), NEW AND ABSOLUTE. corpus_journal_evidence.json is NEVER merged as EVIDENCE. Measured: 1.21
items/work (takes depth 4.16 -> 1.90, a 54% regression on the binding axis), 10 provenance-corrupt spans
(Substack CDN chrome; a blog author-bio bound to a real journal DOI with real Crossref authors), plus
ImageNet/ResNet and PRISMA x3. Its Crossref metadata may be used as an ATTRIBUTION INDEX only. A work enters
the CITABLE ledger only if we hold >=3 verified spans from it.

K-DECLARE (Turn 5). If the admitted pool is not journal-only and English-only, THE DECLARATION IS SCOPED TO
WHAT IS TRUE. A declaration we cannot honor is precisely the fabrication we are trying to kill — and we have
already shipped it once.

K4 / PANEL (Turn 7, hard CI gate). A lever that lifts task 72 and moves nothing on 78/90 is an OVERFIT and is
REVERTED, not tweaked.

K-RUN. Two consecutive turns gaining < +0.0094 on the panel mean while below target -> STOP AND REPORT MISSED.
There is no fallback success state. A plan that ships with a fallback hits the fallback.

K8 / HONESTY. 50 of the 100 tasks are Chinese and nothing we have built composes in Chinese. Every corpus-wide
claim is scoped to the 50 English tasks or retracted on sight.

K-ABORT (overrides everything above, including every score in this plan). One fabricated particular on a
shipped page burns the artifact regardless of score. A 0.60 obtained by fabricating is a 0.00.
